summary_one_line: Input must present a well-formed GSUB/GPOS script record so find_lang_sys_index resolves the exact 'dflt' (HB_OT_TAG_DEFAULT_LANGUAGE) language tag.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A font blob whose OpenType layout table carries valid 4-byte FOURCC tags ('GSUB'/'GPOS' table tag plus script/langsys offset structure) so that hb_ot_layout_script_select_language2 reaches the 'dflt'-lookup branch at line 775 and s.find_lang_sys_index matches HB_OT_TAG_DEFAULT_LANGUAGE.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The winner-resolving seed contains literal ASCII FOURCC tags 'GSUB' and 'GSGB' at offsets 0x0a-0x0f/0x18-0x1f plus a structured offset block (03 00 01 00 10 00 ...) at 0x20, exactly the table/script/langsys layout the parser walks; the per-role overlay shows the winner uniquely taking the true side (lines 776-779 marked [W]).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The loser-blocking seeds carry no clean GSUB/GPOS FOURCC table tag at those offsets (offsets 0x0c-0x0f hold 00/ff/9a/2c noise, not the 'GSUB' ASCII run); they never assemble the script-record structure, so find_lang_sys_index never matches 'dflt' and line 775 stays false (L hits T=0 F=74).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator: cmplog records the concrete operands of the tag/offset comparisons during execution and substitutes those exact bytes into the input, planting the FOURCC tag and offset constants that find_lang_sys_index demands. value_profile has only the CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix gradient and havoc/token mutators (no I2SRandReplace), so it can only approach the tag bucket-by-bucket and never lands the exact multi-byte tag.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked branch is the 'dflt' language-tag lookup at line 775, true side globally blocked.
The winner uniquely executes the true-branch body (lines 776-779) that the loser never reaches.
The winner-resolving seed carries literal FOURCC layout tags GSUB/GSGB and a structured offset block.
The winner seed has the structured table/script/langsys offset block at offset 0x20.
At the FOURCC tag offsets the winner holds the 'GSUB' ASCII run while loser seeds hold unrelated noise bytes.
The loser never takes the line-775 true side: L counts are T=0 F=74 at the blocker.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 775  T=2 F=2  T=0 F=74  if (s.find_lang_sys_index (HB_OT_TAG_DEFAULT_LANGUAGE, la...  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator that value_profile lacks.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, only havoc/token plus CMP_MAP gradient.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5564 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 2 --seed ad81f9e09b6230b7` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 40 of the 41-level ancestor chain; the trailing signal reported '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 40', characteristic of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in vpc.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on find_lang_sys_index for HB_OT_TAG_DEFAULT_LANGUAGE where value_profile resolves the branch as often as value_profile_cmplog (no I2S advantage), showing the exact-tag substitution is not what separates them.

weakest_evidence_point: The winner seed shows 'GSUB'/'GSGB' but the exact byte offsets the parser reads for the dflt-langsys record are inferred from the structured offset block, not directly confirmed against the find_lang_sys_index operand layout.
